core_matrix_exercises.reason: Deterministic TASK_ID route worked on real registered task; bootstrap BOM repair shows intake preflight still fragile.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Add UTF-8 BOM hard check fixture and auto-remediation helper in Astronomicon intake.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Micro-pilot remained controlled and preflight-disciplined; independent external review still pending.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Run first larger pilot preflight with independent Inquisitor + Speculum closure receipts.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Future-domain matrices stayed CANDIDATE_SEED and were not overclaimed.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Attach one safe synthetic backlog item to each seed criterion.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Admission succeeded, but bootstrap repair revealed missing encoding-focused diagnostics in intake preflight.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Introduce CAP-specific diagnostics for missing/invalid template encoding conditions.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Resolver produced valid route and full 8-organ start ACK for this registered task.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Add RU diagnostics bundle for each resolver BLOCK cap.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: current_expected_task pointed to resolvable Stage3 task and start flow did not require manual file hunting.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Micro-pilot scope remained explicit and separated from production runtime claims.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Freeze first larger pilot acceptance thresholds and reviewer roster.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Entry safety gates passed post-repair, but BOM failure path still required owner-led bootstrap intervention.
core_matrix_exercises.next_improvement_hook: Codify bootstrap-repair path into script-first recovery flow.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: No real-use runtime execution was claimed; task remained micro-pilot control loop only.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Manual pipeline route remained traceable, but schema-level checker for registration remains pending.

core_matrix_exercises.reason: Outputs keep manual steps explicit and avoid automation overclaim.
